title: selaginella caespitosum
intro: Selaginella caespitosum, also known as the mat-leaved spike moss, is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella caespitosum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried or crushed to be used as a powder for various applications.
